header_1.info: Choose a color OR image to associate with a product option that utilises swatches.

product_option_name_1.label: Product Option Name
product_option_name_1.info: Match this text to the name of the product option that is utilising a product swatch. If you currently have a swatch with no image or color in it, and that option is titled 'Red', then simply match the text in the box above to 'Red'

product_option_name_2.label: Product Option Name
product_option_name_2.info: Match this text to the name of the product option that is utilising a product swatch. If you currently have a swatch with no image or color in it, and that option is titled 'Red', then simply match the text in the box above to 'Red'

paragraph_3.content: If you require more swatches, add another block to this section.

header_1.info: Associate an image with a tag prefixed with 'usp_'

usp_tag_name_1.label: Associated USP Tag
usp_tag_name_1.info: Match this text to the name of the usp tag that you want to associate an image with. For instance, if you want all products with the badge 'usp_recycled' to show a image of the recyclcing symbol, then simply match the text in the box above to 'usp_recycled', and upload a image of the symbol

usp_tag_name_2.label: Associated USP Tag
usp_tag_name_2.info: Match this text to the name of the usp tag that you want to associate an image with. For instance, if you want all products with the badge 'usp_recycled' to show a image of the recyclcing symbol, then simply match the text in the box above to 'usp_recycled', and upload a image of the symbol
